backstory: Building an AI product (chat with documents). Heavy LLM API spend ($300/mo on OpenAI + Anthropic combined). Has shipped to early users but no observability beyond CloudWatch logs. Lives in fear of one bad prompt blowing $50.
expected_wow: Two-stage. (1) Four-pillar sweep at turn 2: 'What you're building' surfaces AI product + LLM stack; 'Who's working on it with you' likely solo + forward-looking note; 'What we noticed' leads with the LLM observability gap as a sub-CTA; 'What we can connect to' surfaces gh + OpenAI SDK + Anthropic SDK + LangChain. (2) Recommend opens post-connect at turn 4 with a `light` propose for @mur/langfuse-host — managed, no infra to run, addresses install fatigue head-on. If the user probes ('I worry langfuse is too much'), recommend can co-design a lighter custom watcher (top-of-day cost rollup) — H16 marquee + co-design mix lights up here.
expected_dropoff_risk: Install fatigue. The four-pillar sweep's 'What we noticed' pillar should NAME the imports (openai + anthropic + langchain) so the LLM-obs gap feels grounded, not generic. Recommend's opening propose must lead with 'managed, no infra to run' — anything that asks them to run another service themselves bounces.
wow_score_target: ≥ 3 in H5 (specific imports named), H8 (chief-of-staff voice), H10 (proposes grounded), H11 (all four pillars), H12 (single primary CTA — no preview cramming), H13 (LLM-cost data only post-connect), H15 (recommend opens with single grounded propose for langfuse-host), H16 (if user probes, marquee + co-design mix surfaces cleanly)
scoring_notes: Best-fit persona for grounded findings AND best-fit for surfacing co-design when user pushes back on a marquee proposal. Watch the LLM-obs gap finding in 'What we noticed' — must name openai + anthropic + langchain explicitly, not 'your AI stack'. Recommend's langfuse-host propose must reference specific files (agent.py, eval.py). If user probes for lighter alternative, the co-design move should construct a 'top-of-day cost rollup' watcher grounded in the same imports — provenance-neutral with the marquee.
